message:
fix(server): use fetch_max for trigger_immediate phase transition to prevent ABA regression

ShutdownSignal::trigger_immediate now uses fetch_max instead of store
for the phase transition to ForceClosing. A plain store could regress
the phase if a concurrent thread had already advanced it to Stopped
between the is-Stopped check and the store. fetch_max ensures the
phase only moves forward.

A test-only pre-phase hook (TRIGGER_IMMEDIATE_PRE_PHASE_HOOK) is added
via thread_local to allow tests to inject logic between the metadata
writes and the phase transition, enabling deterministic testing of the
concurrent race window.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
